docs.title: ELP Parser Documentation
docs.text: ELP Parser is a PHP library for reading eXeLearning project packages in both legacy and modern formats.

docs.title: Supported Formats
docs.text:
The library follows the format split documented in the upstream eXeLearning project:

  • Legacy .elp packages from eXeLearning 2.x use contentv3.xml
  • Modern .elpx packages from eXeLearning 3+ use content.xml with the ODE 2.0 model
  • Some modern .elp packages also use content.xml, so the parser detects the internal format instead of relying on the extension alone

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• Parse .elp and .elpx
  • Detect legacy contentv3.xml vs modern content.xml
  • Detect eXeLearning major version when exposed by the package metadata
  • Detect likely v4-style .elpx packages using root content.dtd
  • Read title, description, author, license, language and learning resource type
  • Retrieve normalized metadata
  • Enumerate pages, idevices and asset references
  • Extract package contents safely
  • Export parsed summaries as JSON

docs.title: Quick Example
docs.text:
<?php

require 'vendor/autoload.php';

use Exelearning\ELPParser;

$parser = ELPParser::fromFile('path/to/project.elpx');

echo $parser->getTitle() . PHP_EOL;
echo $parser->getVersion() . PHP_EOL;
echo $parser->getContentFormat() . PHP_EOL;
echo $parser->getResourceLayout() . PHP_EOL;

foreach ($parser->getPages() as $page) {
    echo $page['title'] . PHP_EOL;
}

docs.title: Installation
docs.text: composer require exelearning/elp-parser

docs.title: Basic Usage
docs.text:
use Exelearning\ELPParser;

$parser = ELPParser::fromFile('path/to/project.elp');

echo "Title: " . $parser->getTitle() . "\n";
echo "Author: " . $parser->getAuthor() . "\n";
echo "Description: " . $parser->getDescription() . "\n";

docs.title: Format Inspection
docs.text:
echo $parser->getSourceExtension() . "\n";
echo $parser->getContentFile() . "\n";
echo $parser->getContentFormat() . "\n";
echo $parser->getContentSchemaVersion() . "\n";
echo $parser->getExeVersion() . "\n";
echo $parser->getResourceLayout() . "\n";
var_dump($parser->hasRootDtd());
var_dump($parser->isLikelyVersion4Package());

docs.title: Pages, Strings and Assets
docs.text:
$strings = $parser->getStrings();
$pages = $parser->getPages();
$visiblePages = $parser->getVisiblePages();
$blocks = $parser->getBlocks();
$idevices = $parser->getIdevices();
$pageTexts = $parser->getPageTexts();
$visiblePageTexts = $parser->getVisiblePageTexts();
$pageText = $parser->getPageTextById($pages[0]['id']);
$teacherOnlyIdevices = $parser->getTeacherOnlyIdevices();
$hiddenIdevices = $parser->getHiddenIdevices();
$assets = $parser->getAssets();
$images = $parser->getImages();
$audioFiles = $parser->getAudioFiles();
$videoFiles = $parser->getVideoFiles();
$documents = $parser->getDocuments();
$assetsDetailed = $parser->getAssetsDetailed();
$orphanAssets = $parser->getOrphanAssets();
$metadata = $parser->getMetadata();

In modern ODE-based projects, referenced media commonly appears under content/resources/.... Legacy packages and some older exports may still reference resource paths closer to files/tmp/.... The parser classifies this through getResourceLayout().

docs.title: Extraction
docs.text: $parser->extract('path/to/destination');

docs.title: Version Notes
docs.text:
• getVersion() reports the detected eXeLearning major version
  • getContentFormat() reports the internal package model
  • This lets the library handle eXeLearning 2.x and modern ODE-based packages through a single API
  • Newer builds may still expose exe_version=3.0, so exact major detection is not always possible from metadata alone
  • The library therefore uses a heuristic for likely v4-style packages: .elpx + modern ODE layout + root content.dtd

docs.title: Exelearning\ELPParser
docs.text:
Parser for eXeLearning .elp and .elpx project files.

Supported project families:

  • Legacy .elp packages using contentv3.xml
  • Modern .elp / .elpx packages using content.xml

docs.title: __construct(string $filePath)
docs.text: Create a new parser instance from a project file path.

docs.title: fromFile(string $filePath): ELPParser
docs.text: Create a parser instance from a file path.

docs.title: getVersion(): int
docs.text: Return the detected eXeLearning major version.

docs.title: getTitle(): string
docs.text: Return the project title.

docs.title: getDescription(): string
docs.text: Return the project description.

docs.title: getAuthor(): string
docs.text: Return the project author.

docs.title: getLicense(): string
docs.text: Return the project license.

docs.title: getLanguage(): string
docs.text: Return the project language.

docs.title: getLearningResourceType(): string
docs.text: Return the learning resource type when present.

docs.title: getSourceExtension(): string
docs.text: Return the source file extension, usually elp or elpx.

docs.title: getContentFormat(): string
docs.text:
Return the detected internal project format:

  • legacy-contentv3
  • ode-content

docs.title: getContentFile(): string
docs.text:
Return the XML entry used by the package:

  • contentv3.xml
  • content.xml

docs.title: getContentSchemaVersion(): ?string
docs.text: Return the modern ODE schema version when available.

docs.title: getExeVersion(): ?string
docs.text: Return the raw upstream eXeLearning version string when available.

docs.title: getResourceLayout(): string
docs.text:
Return the detected resource layout family:

  • content-resources
  • legacy-temp-paths
  • mixed
  • none

docs.title: hasRootDtd(): bool
docs.text: Return true when the archive contains content.dtd at the root.

docs.title: isLikelyVersion4Package(): bool
docs.text:
Return true when the package matches the current v4 heuristic:

  • .elpx
  • modern content.xml / ODE package
  • root content.dtd

docs.title: isLegacyFormat(): bool
docs.text: Return true for legacy contentv3.xml projects.

docs.title: getStrings(): array
docs.text: Return extracted strings from the project.

docs.title: getPages(): array
docs.text: Return parsed page information, including block and idevice data when available.

docs.title: getVisiblePages(): array
docs.text: Return only visible pages.

docs.title: getBlocks(): array
docs.text: Return all parsed blocks across all pages.

docs.title: getIdevices(): array
docs.text: Return all parsed idevices across all pages.

docs.title: getPageTexts(): array
docs.text: Return grouped text content for each page, including the per-idevice text list and a concatenated page text.

docs.title: getVisiblePageTexts(): array
docs.text: Return grouped text content for visible pages only.

docs.title: getPageTextById(string $pageId): ?array
docs.text: Return grouped text content for a single page, or null if the page ID does not exist.

docs.title: getTeacherOnlyIdevices(): array
docs.text: Return idevices marked as teacher-only.

docs.title: getHiddenIdevices(): array
docs.text: Return idevices whose visibility flag is false.

docs.title: getAssets(): array
docs.text: Return referenced asset paths detected in the parsed content.

docs.title: getAssetsDetailed(): array
docs.text: Return detailed asset records including path, type, extension, page origins, idevice origins and occurrence count.

docs.title: getImages(): array
docs.text: Return image asset paths.

docs.title: getAudioFiles(): array
docs.text: Return audio asset paths.

docs.title: getVideoFiles(): array
docs.text: Return video asset paths.

docs.title: getDocuments(): array
docs.text: Return document asset paths.

docs.title: getOrphanAssets(): array
docs.text: Return asset files present in the ZIP archive but not referenced by the parsed content.

docs.title: getArchiveEntries(): array
docs.text: Return the archive entry names inside the package.

docs.title: getMetadata(): array
docs.text: Return normalized metadata for the project.

docs.title: toArray(): array
docs.text:
Return a compact array summary with:

  • version
  • title
  • description
  • author
  • license
  • language
  • learningResourceType
  • strings

docs.title: jsonSerialize(): mixed
docs.text: Return the value used for JSON serialization.

docs.title: exportJson(?string $destinationPath = null): string
docs.text: Return the JSON representation of the compact summary and optionally write it to disk.

docs.title: extract(string $destinationPath): void
docs.text: Extract the package contents to a directory. Extraction is validated entry by entry to block unsafe ZIP paths.
